message:
v0.3.3: gate check_predictive_warning on predictive policy result

check_predictive_warning() was a second, independent notification path
that bypassed all the gates in evaluate_with_samples() (hard free-space
gate, burst-aware gating, implied-rate sanity gate). When the predictive
policy returned Clear (e.g. >50% free), the raw PID seconds-to-threshold
still triggered notifications.

Fix: if last_predictive_action is Clear, skip the notification entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
